summary: Full-time. Led cross-functional redesign and migration of the primary production website, modernized legacy Terraform, improved Azure DevOps deployment safety with slot swaps, built GitHub Actions workflows for Terraform, and led Azure RBAC cleanup and operational automation.

Full-time, Remote. Worked with clients and vendors on solution design and implementation, oversaw configuration management, security and performance monitoring, incident response, troubleshooting, and infrastructure automation improvements.

Full-time. Created internal, staging, and production environments on AWS ECS, built Jenkins CI/CD pipelines, automated configuration management with Ansible and infrastructure with CloudFormation, managed Linux and Windows server estates, and implemented Prometheus monitoring.
